hints.score: The 0–100 score rates the overall quality of the food: 0–30 poor, 31–60 average, 61–80 good, 81–100 excellent. It factors in both the ingredients and your pet's profile.
hints.pros: The food's upsides — quality ingredients, suitable nutrients and things that match your pet's needs.
hints.cons: What to watch out for — questionable ingredients, missing nutrients or things that may not suit your pet.
hints.textInput: Paste the exact composition from the food packaging (ingredients, analytical components). The more detailed, the more precise the analysis.
hints.fileUpload: Upload a photo or PDF of the packaging (max 5 MB). AI reads the composition and evaluates it. A sharp photo of the ingredients list works best.
hints.allergenWarning: A warning appears when the food contains an ingredient marked as an allergen or intolerance in your pet's profile.
hints.foodSafety: Quick "Can my pet eat…?" check — the answer doesn't replace a vet, but gives you a quick guidance with reasoning.

hero.title: Food Analysis
hero.description: Enter the food ingredients or take a photo of the packaging — AI will evaluate quality, allergen risks and recommendations for your dog. Or quickly ask "Can my dog eat…?"

form.placeholder: Enter food ingredients or scan the packaging…
form.addProfileHint: Add a pet profile in the
form.textPrefilled: Text has been pre-filled. Check it and click Analyze.

errors.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Use JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF.

allergenWarning.petAtRisk: This food may seriously harm your pet's health!

foodSafety.title: Can my dog eat…?
foodSafety.offlineAnswer: Offline answer (no AI). Configure OpenAI key for more accurate results.

history.title: Rating history
